summary: Completed comprehensive testing of theme functionality and logo implementation. All requested features are working correctly.
passed_tests: Login page displays logo.png correctly instead of shield
Theme toggle button in navbar functions properly
Light theme applies to entire page background (not just menu)
Dark theme applies to entire page background
User management page respects both light and dark themes
Theme persistence across navigation between pages
HTML classes change correctly between 'light' and 'dark'
Background colors change appropriately between themes
Logo has correct alt text and CSS classes
Theme toggle has correct data-testid attribute
Login functionality works with admin credentials
